tasks.label: TVM: Run Benchmark (Multipass)
tasks.command: multipass exec tvm-ubuntu -- bash -c 'source /home/ubuntu/hd-project/.venv-linux-tvm/bin/activate && cd /home/ubuntu/hd-project/B12_TVM_Project && python tvm_benchmark.py'

tasks.label: TVM: Run Compile (Multipass)
tasks.command: multipass exec tvm-ubuntu -- bash -c 'source /home/ubuntu/hd-project/.venv-linux-tvm/bin/activate && cd /home/ubuntu/hd-project/B12_TVM_Project && python tvm_compile.py --onnx models/resnet18.onnx --batch 1 --out_dir artifacts/resnet18/batch_1'
